instruction:
Evaluate the following integrals:$\int _{\mathrm{all~space}}( r^{2}+ \mathbf{r} \cdot \mathbf{a} + a^{2}) \delta ^{3}( \mathbf{r} - \mathbf{a} ) d\tau$,where a is a fixed vector and $a$ is its magnitude.

Options:
A. $$
{3 a^{2}}.
$$
B. $$
{5 a^{2}}.
$$
C. $$
{2 a^{2}}.
$$
D. $$
{a^{3}}.
$$
E. $$
{4 a^{2}}.
$$
F. $$
{6 a^{2}}.
$$
G. $$
{a^{2} \times 3}.
$$
H. $$
{a^{2} - a}.
$$
I. $$
{2 a^{3}}.
$$
J. $$
{a^{2} + a}.
$$
